name: ADCB 365 Cashback Credit Card

fees.waiver_conditions: First year free; AED 383.25 from year 2 onwards

notes: Added 2026-07 (card-data verification branch). Rates per ADCB's July 2026 update: 6% dining, 5% fuel & Salik, 3% groceries, 1% other; min AED 2,500/mo to earn (modeled). CAVEAT: real card also gives 5% on digital/AI subscriptions (dropped — engine caps cards at 3 categories) AND caps total cashback at AED 1,000/month (NOT modeled — no overall monthly-cap field), so high-spend estimates may be overstated. Flagged for review. network=Visa, tier=Signature best-effort. Reuses existing AED currency.

name: Standard Chartered Simply Cash Credit Card

fees.waiver_conditions: First year free; from year 2 waived on AED 9,000 annual spend

notes: Added 2026-07 (card-data verification branch). Fee 525 (yr1 free, waived on AED 9,000/yr), salary 8,000, base 1% + 2% international — from Standard Chartered UAE + aggregators.
